stemHtml: What happens if a state finds that it is impracticable to comply with an International Standard?

options.a: It shall give 30 days notice to ICAO of the differences between its own practices and the International Standard.
options.b: It shall give 60 days notice to ICAO of the differences between its own practices and the International Standard.
options.c: It shall give 90 days notice to ICAO of the differences between its own practices and the International Standard.
options.d: It shall give immediate notice to ICAO of the differences between its own practices and the International Standard.
